steps.title: Parallel lines have equal slope
steps.content: Shortcut (par/perp): Parallel lines share the same slope. The line $y = 38x + 5$ has slope 38. Since line $s$ is parallel, it also has slope 38.

steps.title: Write the equation through the origin and evaluate
steps.content: Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$, so its equation is $y = 38x$. At $x = 6$: $d = 38 \times 6 = 228$. The answer is 228.
